title: parse_incoming: id:null error frames routed to wrong branch, relay error lost
description: In transport.rs parse_incoming, the match arm 'Ok(v) if v.get("id").is_some()' also matches id:null (serde_json returns Some(Value::Null)). A JSON-RPC 2.0 parse-error response with id:null — e.g. {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":null,"error":{"code":-32700,...}} — enters the response deserialization branch, fails to parse as JsonRpcResponse (id:u64 rejects null), and emits only a generic warn\!(). The relay's actual error code and message are silently discarded. The intended catch-all branch at line 638 (which logs at error\! level) is never reached. Fix: explicitly check for Value::Null before routing to the response branch.
